questions.question_text_full: How did US make sure that the Balloon flying over its territory was a ‘spy’ balloon?

options.text: the FBI lab confirmed that it was a spy balloon
the analysts studied its flight path and said so
it's reconnaissance aircraft saw the antennas and equipment of the balloon
it got the samples of the balloon checked in a lab

questions.correct_option_text: it's reconnaissance aircraft saw the antennas and equipment of the balloon
